task_description: Implement auth and representative onboarding for Athena Rails app (Auth Zero, Organization, User, InviteToken, MeetingAssignment, invite flow, magic link, seeds, views, tests)
reflection_q1: Should have read the generated migration before planning modifications — generator output changed in v4 (uses email not email_address). Also before_create vs before_validation is a Rails gotcha worth noting upfront.
reflection_q2: When working with generators, plan phase should include 'inspect generated output first' before writing modification plan. Generator output varies by version.
reflection_q3: Would have predicted the before_create/before_validation validation ordering issue — it's a well-known Rails footgun for auto-generated tokens. Should flag this class of problem during ISC creation.

task_description: Fix workon script not finding demsabroad projects
reflection_q1: Should have tested glob patterns in isolation before writing fix — nullglob issue was avoidable
reflection_q2: Smarter: run _list_projects in test shell first, then integrate. Saves one iteration.
reflection_q3: No skills needed — pure script debugging. Correctly used none.
